description: Dragon-blooded warriors with scaled hides and elemental breath, driven by clan honor and personal glory.
subraces: Red Dragonborn
Fire-breathers with crimson scales, quick to anger and fiercely competitive.
Blue Dragonborn
Lightning-breathers with azure scales, prizing order, strategy, and patience.
Green Dragonborn
Poison-breathers with emerald scales -- cunning schemers preferring manipulation over force.
Black Dragonborn
Acid-breathers with dark scales favoring ambush, grudges, and swampy isolation.
White Dragonborn
Frost-breathers with pale scales, primal and savage, thriving in frozen wastelands.
Gold Dragonborn
Fire-breathers with gilded scales -- noble and wise, often drawn to righteous causes.
Silver Dragonborn
Cold-breathers with gleaming scales, befriending other races and championing the weak.
Bronze Dragonborn
Lightning-breathers with warm metallic scales, drawn to the sea and coastal defense.
Brass Dragonborn
Fire-breathers with tawny scales -- gregarious storytellers talking as much as they fight.
Copper Dragonborn
Acid-breathers with ruddy scales, notorious pranksters disarming foes with wit.
Amethyst Dragonborn
Force-breathers with violet scales, introspective psionics studying planar boundaries.
Crystal Dragonborn
Radiant-breathers with sparkling scales -- friendly optimists collecting friendships like gems.
Emerald Dragonborn
Psychic-breathers with translucent green scales, paranoid scholars hoarding forbidden lore.
Sapphire Dragonborn
Thunder-breathers with deep blue scales, militant strategists waging war on aberrations.
Topaz Dragonborn
Necrotic-breathers with amber scales -- cynical loners distrusting the living and the dead alike.
Draconblood
Politically cunning city-dwellers climbing to power through charm and social maneuvering.
Ravenite
Freed slaves hardened by oppression, fierce and communal, forged in shared suffering.
